name: Sinostar PEC Holdings Limited
summary: Sinostar PEC Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, produces and supplies petrochemical products in the People's Republic of China. It operates in two segments, Gas Separation, and Transport and Logistic Services. The company offers liquefied petroleum gas (LPG), which is used as a source of fuel by households and industrial manufacturers; propylene, an organic compound to produce chemical intermediates, such as polypropylene and vinyl; purified isobutylene, methyl tert-butyl ether, and hydrogen; and polypropylene, a thermoplastic polymer under the Hengchang brand that is used to produce plastic products for various industrial applications. It also provides logistics and transportation services for LPG and petroleum related products. Sinostar PEC Holdings Limited sells its products to manufacturers of petrochemical and plastic products, as well as LPG distributors. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Singapore. Sinostar PEC Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Intelligent People Holdings Limited.
